event_blocks.summary: Kendall Jenner introduces her "what I wear in a week" series, beginning with Monday's "everyday kind of running errands" look: a Sunday Best black tee, Khaite high-waisted black jeans praised for their fit and length, a Khaite sleeveless red sweater for a "pop of red," and The Row brown loafers described as "really pretty." She emphasizes the importance of vintage Gucci sunglasses, calling them a "daily staple" she "can't leave the house or the hotel without." For Tuesday's "Fashion Week look," Jenner dons a vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress, noting its comfort and stretch for mobility, paired with vintage Gucci boots and a Bottega bag, which she calls "the perfect size for anything and everything." Her "vibe" for Milan Fashion Week is that of "a little Italian designer in Italy." By Wednesday, her "uniform" for "going to work, going to set, going to a meeting" is a white t-shirt and blue jeans, layered with a "special" beige The Row coat. She reiterates her love for The Row coat as a "good classic trench" and praises the Khaite blue jeans as the "best fit ever," similar to her earlier black pair. Her "ultimate favorite" black boots from The Row are described as a "take on a riding boot," resonating with her "horse girl" identity. Jenner concludes by again highlighting her extensive collection of vintage Gucci sunglasses, a constant accessory she "will never get sick of."

Brown loafers.description: Comfortable, almost-brown leather loafers worn with the outfit, noted by Kendall's voice as 'super comfortable' and suitable for wearing 'everywhere.'

High-waisted black jeans.description: Long, slim-fit black jeans with a high waist, praised for their perfect fit and length.

Khaite sleeveless red sweater.description: A vibrant red, sleeveless sweater draped over the shoulders, described as a favorite layering piece.

Kendall Jenner.description: Wearing a white t-shirt, blue jeans, and a beige The Row coat; she accessorizes with black boots and vintage Gucci sunglasses, gesturing expressively while describing her outfit in a bright, stylish room, speaking with enthusiasm and identifying herself as a 'horse girl.'

Sunday Best black tee.description: A simple, fitted black t-shirt worn as the base layer of the outfit.

Vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress.description: A form-fitting, sleeveless beige dress worn for a more formal Fashion Week look, described as comfortable and practical for moving between events.

Black Gucci boots.description: Pointed-toe, mid-calf black leather boots with ankle ties, praised by Kendall as a beloved item she wears 'all the time' due to their comfort and stylish appearance.

Bottega bag.description: A brand new, structured black quilted bag with a shoulder strap, which Kendall refers to as 'This The Row bag' in the audio, describing it as a 'good basic' she's 'obsessed with' and the perfect size for carrying everything.

Vintage Gucci sunglasses.description: Classic black cat-eye sunglasses, which Kendall states she 'can't leave the house or the hotel without 'em' and confirms are 'vintage Gucci,' adding that she owns 'a lot of' them.

Wednesday.description: A title card indicating the day of the week, signaling a shift to a new outfit segment.

White t-shirt.description: A simple, fitted white t-shirt worn as the base layer, described by Kendall as a 'Sunday Best tee' that is 'so good and stretchy and kind of a thicker fabric.'

Blue jeans.description: Straight-leg, medium-wash denim jeans, identified by Kendall as from Khaite and 'the exact black jean' style she wore earlier, which she 'will never get sick of' and calls the 'best fit ever.'

The Row coat.description: A beige, structured coat, described by Kendall as 'all I wear,' a 'good classic trench,' and a piece she is 'absolutely obsessed with' and can wear in the spring.

Meeting Look.description: On-screen text describing the white t-shirt and jeans outfit as a professional, everyday look for work or meetings.

Black boots.description: Pointed-toe, mid-calf black leather boots, identified by Kendall as 'The Row as well' and her 'ultimate favorite,' described as a 'take on a riding boot' that she loves as a 'horse girl' and feels represents her.

raw_segments: Kendall Jenner enters a bright, stylishly decorated room with wooden floors and bookshelves, smiling as she greets the audience, stating, "Hey Vogue, I'm Kendall Jenner and this is what I wear in a week." Upbeat, light pop music begins to play softly as the scene transitions to a title card showcasing '7 Days, 7 Looks with Kendall Jenner' and five different outfits. The focus then shifts to Monday’s look, which Kendall describes as her "everyday kind of running errands, running around town look." She is seen wearing a simple, fitted black tee, which she identifies as "a little black tee by Sunday's Best." Her high-waisted black jeans, which she states are from 'Kate' (Khaite) and are "probably my most favorite jeans ever" for their "best fit and super long" length, are highlighted through alternating full-body and close-up shots. She specifically notes their "perfect high waist, mid-waist spot." Draped over her shoulders is a vibrant red sleeveless sweater, also from 'Kate' (Khaite), which she loves for its "pop of red" and as a practical layering piece to "warm myself back up." She completes the ensemble with brown loafers, identifying them as from 'The Row' and describing them as "really pretty like brown with like almost like a hint of red in them," expressing her affection for them. Throughout, Kendall maintains a confident, relaxed demeanor, gesturing expressively as she speaks directly to the camera in the consistent, naturally lit room.

The video begins with a close-up of brown loafers on a wooden floor, accompanied by text stating 'I love these loafers, they're actually super comfortable.' Kendall Jenner's voice confirms, "they're actually super comfortable. I feel like I can wear them everywhere." The scene then transitions to Kendall in a bright, stylish room, wearing a Sunday Best black tee, high-waisted black jeans, and a Khaite sleeveless red sweater draped over her shoulders, paired with the brown loafers. She walks confidently, adjusting her vintage Gucci sunglasses, and states, "I don't ever leave the house or a hotel without a pair of sunglasses. I just feel safe behind them or something... These are vintage, they're Gucci. Love these guys." She then picks up a brand new Bottega bag, describing it as "the perfect size for anything and everything," adding, "Love him." On-screen labels highlight her outfit: 'Layers,' 'Big Bag,' 'Baby Tee,' 'Fav Jeans,' 'Loafers,' and 'Vintage Sunglasses.' A light, jazzy instrumental track begins as the scene shifts to a new look for 'Tuesday.' Kendall, now in a vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress and black Gucci boots, holding a small clutch, explains, "this is what I'm calling my Fashion Week look... I am wearing a vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress, which I love, it's very comfortable and stretchy... so I can get in and out of buildings, in and out of cars, go to shoots and shows and feel really comfortable and not feel like I'm really constrained. I actually feel really good in this dress." Close-ups show the black Gucci boots, which she identifies as "vintage Gucci boots, they're just a good find," as she walks, emphasizing their comfort and suitability for the week ahead.

The minute opens with Kendall Jenner, dressed in a form-fitting beige vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress, black Gucci boots, and carrying a bag, confidently walking a city sidewalk as photographers capture her. She then transitions to a bright, stylish room to present her outfit, speaking clearly and enthusiastically. She highlights her black Gucci boots, which she loves and wears "all the time," before presenting a structured black quilted bag, which she refers to as "This The Row bag," describing it as a "good basic" she's "obsessed with." She then showcases vintage Gucci sunglasses, emphasizing they are a daily staple she wears "every single day." Kendall describes this ensemble as her "vibe" for Milan Fashion Week, envisioning herself as "a little Italian designer in Italy." After a brief transition marked by movement sounds, a laugh at 0:31, and a sigh at 0:33, she presents a new outfit for Wednesday, consisting of a white t-shirt and blue jeans. She describes this simple, comfortable look as her "going to work, going to set, going to a meeting look" and her everyday "uniform." She then adds a beige The Row coat, which she considers a "special" piece she likes to "throw on." The room's natural lighting and curated aesthetic remain consistent, underscoring her fashion-forward yet practical approach.

Kendall Jenner stands in a bright, stylish room with wooden floors and bookshelves, presenting a casual yet polished outfit. She begins by putting on a beige The Row coat, which she enthusiastically describes as 'shocker, it's all I wear,' and 'a good classic trench' that she's 'absolutely obsessed with' and can wear in the spring. Beneath the coat, she wears a white t-shirt, which she identifies as a 'Sunday Best tee,' noting its stretchy, thick fabric. She then highlights her blue jeans, stating they are from Khaite and are 'the exact black jean' style she wore earlier, praising them as the 'best fit ever' and expressing she 'will never get sick of these jeans.' Next, she showcases her black boots, also from The Row, calling them her 'ultimate favorite' and a 'take on a riding boot.' As a self-proclaimed 'horse girl,' she expresses a deep connection to them, smiling as she says she feels like she 'would be' this boot. Finally, she turns to a full-length mirror to put on vintage Gucci sunglasses, explaining she 'can't leave the house or the hotel without 'em' and that she owns 'a lot of vintage Gucci sunglasses,' reinforcing her love for the brand. On-screen text like 'That's all I wear' and 'I have a lot of vintage Gucci sunglasses' appears, complementing her commentary in the warm, curated room.

event_blocks.summary: Kendall Jenner, initially in a beige The Row coat, white t-shirt, blue jeans, and black boots, adds a black shoulder bag, identifying it as "The Row" and a "really good bag to add a pop of color," while reflecting on her previous "Meeting Look" being for "doing business" and "cracking big deals." Following a transition sound, Kendall adopts her 'Airport Look' for Thursday, confidently walking through a bright, stylish room. She is now wearing a distressed black leather jacket, a vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, and a black New York Yankees cap worn backward, accessorized with black pointed-toe boots and a black shoulder bag. Kendall explains her travel strategy, prioritizing comfort on planes and carrying leggings in her carry-on to change into post-security, stating she doesn't wear these jeans in-flight. She details her distressed black leather jacket as a "Ralph Lauren jacket from 2018" and her jeans as "Levi 501s," noting they were likely "men's" and "huge on me when I got" them, also highlighting the vintage tee. Split-screen visuals emphasize her cap and jacket as she shares her travel tips.

Black boots.description: Previously described as 'ultimate favorite' riding boots, now worn with the 'Airport Look' outfit, maintaining their pointed-toe, mid-calf style, and mentioned by Kendall as part of her 'doing business' ensemble.

Black shoulder bag.description: A structured black bag with a shoulder strap, carried in the 'Airport Look' for travel, replacing the previous Bottega bag, and identified by Kendall as 'The Row' and a 'really good bag to add a pop of color'.

Blue jeans.description: Previously straight-leg medium-wash denim, now replaced by light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans in the 'Airport Look', and mentioned by Kendall as part of her 'doing business' ensemble.

Black New York Yankees cap.description: A black baseball cap with a white 'NY' logo, worn backward, adding a casual, sporty touch to the 'Airport Look'.

Distressed black leather jacket.description: A worn, vintage-style black leather jacket with visible distressing and hardware details, worn over a graphic tee for the 'Airport Look', identified by Kendall as a 'Ralph Lauren jacket from 2018'.

The Row coat.description: Previously worn as a structured beige coat over the white t-shirt and jeans, described by Kendall as part of her 'doing business' look.

White t-shirt.description: Previously worn as a base layer in the 'Meeting Look', now replaced by a graphic tee in the 'Airport Look', and mentioned by Kendall as part of her 'doing business' ensemble.

Vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee.description: A dark t-shirt with a bold, retro Harley-Davidson motorcycle graphic, worn as the base layer in the 'Airport Look', and referred to by Kendall as a 'vintage tee'.

Kendall Jenner.description: Wearing a distressed black leather jacket, vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, black New York Yankees cap, black shoulder bag, and black pointed-toe boots; she gestures while explaining her travel outfit in a bright, stylish room, describing her previous look as for 'doing business' and 'cracking big deals,' and her travel strategy of changing into leggings on the plane for comfort.

Vintage Gucci sunglasses.description: Previously worn with the 'Meeting Look', now absent in the 'Airport Look' segment.

Vintage Levi’s 501 jeans.description: Light-wash, straight-leg denim jeans with a classic 501 fit, described as vintage and worn with the 'Airport Look', identified by Kendall as 'Levi 501s' that she believes were 'men's' and 'huge on me when I got' them.

raw_segments: The segment opens with Kendall Jenner, still in her polished 'Meeting Look' of a beige The Row coat, white t-shirt, blue jeans, and black boots, adding a black shoulder bag. She describes the bag as "The Row," a "really good bag to add a pop of color," and reflects on the previous outfit's purpose for "doing business" and "cracking big deals." A transition sound then signals a shift as Kendall changes into her 'Airport Look' for Thursday. She now confidently walks through the bright, stylish room, wearing a distressed black leather jacket, a vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, and a black New York Yankees cap worn backward, accessorized with black pointed-toe boots and a black shoulder bag. Kendall explains her travel strategy, stating she loves to be comfortable on a plane and doesn't wear these jeans in-flight, instead carrying leggings in her carry-on to change into after security. She identifies her distressed black leather jacket as a "Ralph Lauren jacket from 2018" and her jeans as "Levi 501s," which she believes were "men's" and "huge on me when I got" them, emphasizing the vintage tee as well. The video uses split-screen to highlight details of her cap and jacket as she shares her practical yet stylish travel tips.

event_blocks.summary: Kendall Jenner first presented her 'Airport Look' in a bright, stylish room, wearing a distressed black leather jacket over a vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans tailored for length, and black pointed-toe boots, topped with a backward black New York Yankees cap. She explained her customization of the jeans and the comfort of her knee-high boots with a small heel, then zipped up her jacket with an audible sound. After adding sunglasses, she declared her departure for the airport. Transitioning to a 'Vacation Look,' Kendall wore a white Bode shirt open over a black bra top, paired with black flowy pants and sandals, describing the pants as 'super comfortable.' She then showcased a personalized yellow 'Bode bag,' a gift featuring elements representing her dog, nickname, car, and favorite places, noting its large size was perfect for vacation essentials. Later, for a 'Night Out Look,' she donned a black leather mini dress, sheer black tights, and red pointed-toe heels, emphasizing her preference for comfortable yet 'cute and sexy' outfits. She stated the entire ensemble, including Bottega earrings, dress, and shoes, was from the designer, contrasting the black dress with a pastel yellow version she wore previously. Kendall then selected a small red Bottega bag that matched her shoes, expressing her preference for smaller evening bags. The segment concluded with her pleased with the complete Bottega look.

Sandals.description: Simple, flat black sandals with a minimal strap design, worn for comfort and ease during the 'Vacation Look'.

Vacation Look.description: On-screen text labeling the outfit as a relaxed, comfortable ensemble ideal for travel and leisure, which the speaker describes as her 'vacation vibe,' featuring the white Bode shirt, black bra top, black flowy pants, sandals, and custom bag.

Black bra top.description: A simple, form-fitting black top, referred to by the speaker as 'a little bra top,' worn as a base layer under the white Bode shirt, visible at the neckline and midriff.

White Bode shirt.description: A white, long-sleeved, relaxed-fit shirt, described by the speaker as a 'Bode shirt' that she loves and finds 'so pretty,' worn open over a black bra top, featuring subtle black stitching details along the front placket.

Black New York Yankees cap.description: A black baseball cap with a white 'NY' logo, worn backward, adding a casual, sporty touch to the 'Airport Look'.

Distressed black leather jacket.description: A worn, vintage-style black leather jacket with visible distressing and hardware details, worn over a graphic tee for the 'Airport Look'; Kendall audibly states she'd wear it 'zipped up,' followed by the distinct sound of a zipper being pulled up.

Vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee.description: A dark t-shirt with a bold, retro Harley-Davidson motorcycle graphic, worn as the base layer in the 'Airport Look'.

Kendall’s Sunglasses.description: Dark sunglasses worn at the end of the 'Airport Look' segment, adding a finishing touch to the outfit; Kendall audibly says 'sunglasses' as she puts them on, accompanied by rustling sounds.

Kendall Jenner.description: Visually showcases her outfits, gestures, and checks her reflection, while audibly describing her clothing choices, noting she tailored her Levi's 501 jeans for length, identifying her 'Row' boots as comfortable and knee-high, zipping her leather jacket, adding sunglasses, and introducing her 'Vacation Look' with 'Row slouchy flowy pants' as super comfortable, speaking in a clear, conversational tone.

Black pointed-toe boots.description: Pointed-toe, mid-calf black leather boots, worn with the 'Airport Look'; Kendall audibly identifies them as 'Row boots,' noting they are 'a bit high,' go 'up to the knee,' have a 'small little heel,' and are 'comfortable.'

Black flowy pants.description: Loose, wide-leg black pants with a slouchy, comfortable fit, paired with flat sandals for a casual vacation aesthetic.

Vintage Levi’s 501 jeans.description: Light-wash, straight-leg denim jeans with a classic 501 fit, described as vintage and worn with the 'Airport Look'; Kendall audibly confirms they are 'Levi's 501s' and mentions she tailored them to fit, often needing men's jeans for sufficient length.

Sheer black tights.description: Opaque black tights with a sheer texture, worn under the black leather mini dress to add sophistication and coverage, noted for their seamless fit.

Red pointed-toe heels.description: Elegant, high-heeled shoes with a pointed toe and red patent finish, adding a pop of color and glamour. Kendall confirms these are 'Bottega shoes' and that the red Bottega bag 'matches my shoes.'

Black leather mini dress.description: A form-fitting, sleeveless black leather dress with a V-neckline, worn with sheer black tights and red heels. Kendall describes it as 'cute and sexy,' 'form-fitting,' and having a 'snatched waist,' noting she loves its fit. She refers to it as a 'black silky one' and mentions wearing a 'pastel yellow' version to the US Open last year.

Night Out Look.description: On-screen text introducing the outfit segment. Kendall introduces it as a 'Night out look, birthday party look, whatever you want to call it,' emphasizing her desire for comfort while feeling 'cute and sexy.'

Custom Bag.description: A large, bright yellow tote bag, referred to by the speaker as a 'Bode bag' and a 'big sack bag,' which she received as a birthday gift. She expresses her love for its personalized, eclectic design, explaining that the 'Arizona' inscription is her dog's name, 'Kung Fu Kenny' is what her friends call her, and other designs represent her car and favorite places. She highlights its practicality for vacation, beach trips, and holding items like books and sunscreen, noting its 'very big' and 'perfect size for vacation.'

Vintage Gucci sunglasses.description: Dark, classic cat-eye sunglasses worn to complete the 'Vacation Look', adding a touch of vintage glamour.

Bottega bag.description: A small, structured red bag with gold hardware, held by Kendall. She describes it as a 'smaller, small-ish bag' ideal for a night out, confirming it 'matches my shoes' and is 'also Bottega.'

Bottega earrings.description: Gold, chunky hoop earrings worn with the black leather mini dress. Kendall explicitly names them as 'Bottega earrings' and part of her 'all Bottega' ensemble.

raw_segments: The video segment begins with Kendall Jenner in a bright, stylish room, showcasing her 'Airport Look.' She wears a distressed black leather jacket over a vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee, light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans, black pointed-toe boots, and a black New York Yankees cap worn backward. Speaking in a clear, conversational tone, Kendall explains she tailored her 'Levi's 501s' to fit, noting she often needs men's jeans for sufficient length. She highlights her 'Row boots,' describing them as 'a bit high,' going 'up to the knee,' with a 'small little heel' for comfort. On-screen text labels the outfit components: 'Good Leather Jacket,' 'Vintage Tee,' 'Worn Jeans,' and 'Boots.' Kendall then adjusts her jacket, stating she'd wear it 'zipped up,' and the distinct sound of a zipper pulling up is heard as she zips it. Checking her reflection, she adds 'sunglasses' for a final touch, accompanied by rustling sounds, declaring, 'This is me. To the airport, I go.' Faint background music plays throughout. A 'FRIDAY' title card transitions the scene, and Kendall reappears in a new 'Vacation Look,' which she introduces as 'my vacation look.' She wears a white Bode shirt over a black bra top, paired with black flowy pants and sandals, describing the pants as 'Row slouchy flowy pants' and emphasizing their 'super comfortable' feel. On-screen text labels this as 'Vacation Look.'

The video opens in a bright, stylish room with a woman showcasing her 'Vacation Look,' consisting of a white Bode shirt worn open over a black bra top, black flowy pants, and sandals. She adjusts her shirt, which she describes as 'so pretty,' and turns to display the outfit. Moving to a bookshelf, she picks up a large, vibrant yellow tote bag, which she calls a 'Bode bag' and a 'big sack bag.' She expresses her deep affection for the bag, explaining it was a personalized birthday gift. She details its whimsical designs, revealing that 'Arizona' is her dog's name, 'Kung Fu Kenny' is her nickname, and other elements represent her car and favorite places, making it 'a lot of me.' She highlights its practicality for beach trips, holding books, and sunscreen, noting its 'very big' and 'perfect size for vacation.' After slinging the bag over her shoulder and putting on vintage Gucci sunglasses, she smiles and gestures, summarizing the ensemble as her 'vacation vibe.' A 'SATURDAY' title card transitions the scene, and she reappears in a completely different 'Night Out Look': a sleek black leather mini dress, sheer black tights, and red pointed-toe heels, whose distinct clicking sounds are audible as she strikes a pose. She begins to introduce this new outfit, saying, 'So, this is my...' before the minute concludes. The warm, curated room, with its clothing rack, bookshelves, mirror, and floral arrangement, remains consistent throughout.

The segment opens with a 'Night Out Look' title card, transitioning to Kendall Jenner in a bright, stylish room. She wears a form-fitting black leather mini dress with a V-neckline, sheer black tights, and red pointed-toe heels. Kendall speaks, explaining her preference for comfort while still feeling "cute and sexy" for a night out, emphasizing her love for the dress's "form-fitting" nature and "snatched waist." She reveals the entire ensemble, from "ears to toes," is Bottega, explicitly naming the "Bottega earrings, Bottega dress, Bottega shoes," and expressing her admiration for Bottega as one of her favorite Italian designers. She recalls wearing a "pastel yellow" version of the dress to the US Open last year, contrasting it with the current "black silky one," and reiterates her satisfaction with its "super form-fitting and cute" design. On-screen text reinforces her commentary, including 'I love to be really comfortable when I go out,' 'Bottega dress, Bottega shoes,' and 'I got this whole look on Fwrd,' as she mentions her connection to Fwrd. She then picks up a small, structured red Bottega bag with gold hardware, noting her preference for "smaller, small-ish bag[s]" for evenings out and highlighting how it perfectly "matches my shoes." The camera alternates between full-body shots, close-ups of her legs and shoes, and mirror reflections, capturing her expressive gestures and the outfit's luxurious details under soft, natural lighting. The segment concludes with Kendall holding the red bag, smiling, and looking pleased with the complete look.

event_blocks.summary: Kendall Jenner initially presents a black leather mini dress with sheer black tights and red pointed-toe heels, accessorized by a red Bottega bag, stating it's her preferred 'night out' attire for parties or dinners, feeling both comfortable and loving the look, with on-screen text highlighting 'Little Black Dress,' 'Semi Sheers,' 'Fun Bag,' and 'Croc Mules' amidst upbeat music. Following a 'SUNDAY' title card and fabric rustling sounds, Jenner transitions to a 'Workout Look,' donning a black workout bodysuit, white socks, and white sneakers, identifying them as 'Sambas' not for gym use. She explains this is her typical attire for early morning Pilates sessions, adding a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt, which she reveals belonged to her father, describing it as 'super old and cozy and really worn in,' affectionately referring to it as 'this guy,' all presented with playful gestures and split-screen views.

Sheer black tights.description: Opaque black tights with a sheer texture, worn under the black leather mini dress to add sophistication and coverage, noted for their seamless fit.

Red pointed-toe heels.description: Elegant, high-heeled shoes with a pointed toe and red patent finish, adding a pop of color and glamour to the 'Night Out Look', described as a favorite for going out.

Black leather mini dress.description: A form-fitting, sleeveless black leather dress with a V-neckline, worn with sheer black tights and red heels, which Kendall describes as 'the vibe' for a night out, birthday party, or friend's dinner, making her feel 'very comfortable' and loved.

Bottega bag.description: A small, structured red bag with gold hardware, held by Kendall as a perfect accessory to match the Bottega look, described as ideal for a night out.

Workout bodysuit.description: A black, form-fitting one-piece athletic outfit with thin straps and shorts, worn for her 'workout day,' which she states is 'probably what you'll find me in most days of the week' for early morning Pilates.

SUNDAY title card.description: A bold, black text overlay reading 'SUNDAY' that appears as a transition between outfit segments, signaling the start of a new day and look.

Kendall Jenner.description: Her voice is heard throughout, describing her outfits, routines, and personal connection to items, sounding casual, friendly, and confident.

White sneakers.description: Classic white athletic shoes with black stripes, identified by Kendall as 'Sambas,' which she wears for Pilates instead of a 'proper gym shoe.'

Work Out Look.description: On-screen text labeling the athletic outfit segment, appearing in a split-screen format with a close-up of Kendall’s face and full-body shot, emphasizing the casual, functional nature of the look.

Navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt.description: A vintage, oversized navy sweatshirt with 'USA' in bold red and white letters, which Kendall reveals was 'actually my dad's sweatshirt,' describing it as 'super old and cozy and really worn in,' and affectionately calling it 'this guy.'

raw_segments: The segment opens with Kendall Jenner showcasing a sleek, form-fitting black leather mini dress, paired with sheer black tights and red pointed-toe heels, while holding a vibrant red Bottega bag. She stands in a bright, stylish room, introducing the outfit by stating, "I feel like this is the vibe." She elaborates that this is "most likely what I would wear on a night out, to a birthday party, or a friend's dinner," emphasizing, "I feel very comfortable and I love it." On-screen text labels the key pieces: 'Little Black Dress,' 'Semi Sheers,' 'Fun Bag,' and 'Croc Mules,' all set to light, upbeat instrumental music. The scene transitions with a 'SUNDAY' title card, accompanied by sounds of rustling fabric. Kendall then changes into a black workout bodysuit with white socks and white sneakers, announcing, "this is my workout day." She explains this is "probably what you'll find me in most days of the week," as she gets up "pretty early every morning" for Pilates, identifying her white sneakers as "Sambas" worn instead of a "proper gym shoe." She then adds a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt, revealing it was "actually my dad's sweatshirt," describing it as "super old and cozy and really worn in," and affectionately calling it "this guy." The segment maintains a casual, personal tone with playful gestures and split-screen views.

event_blocks.summary: Kendall Jenner, in a bright room with bookshelves and a clothing rack, is dressed in a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt labeled 'Dad’s Fleece,' over a grey collared shirt, black shorts labeled 'Romper,' white socks, and white Adidas Samba trainers. With upbeat background music, Kendall introduces her most-used black leather tote bag from The Row, calling it 'Carry All,' describing it as a "good slouchy tote bag" that she wears "probably every single day" and that "goes with literally everything," demonstrating its versatility and interior. She then adds her signature dark sunglasses, stating, "Uh, lastly, my sunglasses," completing her everyday look which she summarizes as "my me the majority of the time." After posing, she transitions to a relaxed aesthetic, appearing barefoot in a flowing, light grey sleeveless maxi dress. The scene concludes with a quick cut to production credits, including Producer, Camera Operators, and Gaffer, before fading to black, as Kendall thanks Vogue and encourages viewers to subscribe.

Adidas Samba Trainers.description: Classic white athletic shoes with black stripes, worn with white socks and black shorts, completing the casual, everyday look.

Production Credits.description: On-screen text listing production roles such as Producer, Camera Operators, AC/DIT, Gaffer, and Production Assistants, displayed in a clean, minimalist font against a white background.

Kendall’s Sunglasses.description: Dark, stylish sunglasses worn at the end of the segment to complete the outfit, which Kendall introduces by saying, "lastly, my sunglasses."

Light grey sleeveless maxi dress.description: A flowing, elegant, light grey dress with a V-neckline and sheer overlay, worn barefoot, suggesting a relaxed or evening look, replacing the previous casual outfit.

Kendall Jenner.description: Wearing a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt over a grey collared shirt, black shorts, white socks, and white Adidas Samba trainers; she gestures while showcasing her black leather tote bag and sunglasses, then transitions into a light grey sleeveless maxi dress, barefoot, in a bright room with bookshelves and a clothing rack. She speaks in a clear, conversational voice, describing her most-worn items and concluding with a Vogue outro.

Black leather tote bag.description: A large, slouchy black leather tote bag from The Row, described by Kendall as "the bag you will see me in most in life," "wearing this bag probably every single day," "the most worn bag that I own," and one that "goes with literally everything." It is carried on her shoulder and shown in close-up, with a simple, versatile design.

Navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt.description: A vintage, oversized navy sweatshirt with 'USA' in bold red and white letters, described as cozy and worn-in, originally belonging to her father, worn over a grey collared shirt.

raw_segments: The segment opens with Kendall Jenner in a bright, stylish room with bookshelves and a clothing rack, dressed in a casual ensemble. She wears a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt, which on-screen text labels 'Dad’s Fleece,' over a grey collared shirt, black shorts labeled 'Romper,' white socks, and white Adidas Samba trainers, also labeled on-screen. A light, upbeat background music plays as Kendall, speaking in a clear, conversational tone, introduces her most-used black leather tote bag. She states, "This is the bag you will see me in most in life," elaborating that she wears it "probably every single day" and it's "definitely the most worn bag that I own." She identifies the bag as being from The Row, describing it as "a good slouchy tote bag" that "goes with literally everything," while demonstrating its versatility and showing its interior. On-screen text labels the bag 'Carry All.' She then adds her signature dark sunglasses, which she introduces by saying, "Uh, lastly, my sunglasses," completing the casual, everyday look she summarizes as "my me the majority of the time." After posing confidently, she transitions into a new, more relaxed aesthetic, appearing barefoot in a flowing, light grey sleeveless maxi dress. The scene concludes with a quick cut to production credits, listing roles like Producer, Camera Operators, and Gaffer, before fading to black, as Kendall thanks Vogue and encourages viewers to subscribe.

event_blocks.summary: The video segment begins with a display of production credits against a minimalist white background, featuring names and roles such as Otto Gaiser (Key Grip), David Lowrey Jr (Sound Recordist), Dani Michelle (Wardrobe Stylist), Maren Taylor (Wardrobe Assistant), Mary Phillips (Makeup Artist), Jen Atkin (Hair Stylist), Simone Moscovitch (Set Designer), Sierra Fotouhi (Set Design Assistant), Darnell Depradine (Editor), Jasjeet Singh (Localisation Editor), Katie Haworth (Production Assistant), Francesca Hartley (Production Coordinator), Benjamin Whitley (Producer, Local Language), Nikki Hopkins (Production Manager), Tom Sandford (Senior Lead, Central Productions), Michael Gora (VP, Production Operations, Digital Video, Local Language), and Ezzie Chidi-Ofong (SVP, Digital Video, Local Language), with Peerspace credited for the location. A light, upbeat instrumental music track plays throughout these credits. The segment concludes with the VOGUE Logo appearing centered on the white background in a bold, classic serif font, while the background music continues.

Production Credits.description: On-screen text listing production roles such as Key Grip, Sound Recordist, Wardrobe Stylist, Makeup Artist, Hair Stylist, Set Designer, Editor, Production Assistant, Production Coordinator, Producer, Production Manager, Senior Lead, VP, SVP, and Location, displayed in a clean, minimalist black font on a white background, accompanied by light, upbeat instrumental background music.

VOGUE Logo.description: The iconic 'VOGUE' brand name displayed in a bold, classic serif font, centered on a white background, marking the conclusion of the credits and the brand’s identity, with light, upbeat instrumental background music continuing to play alongside it.

raw_segments: The video segment transitions from a series of production credits to a final brand reveal. Initially, the screen displays a clean, minimalist white background with black text listing various crew members and their roles, including Otto Gaiser (Key Grip), David Lowrey Jr (Sound Recordist), Dani Michelle (Wardrobe Stylist), Maren Taylor (Wardrobe Assistant), Mary Phillips (Makeup Artist), and Jen Atkin (Hair Stylist). This is followed by additional credits for Simone Moscovitch (Set Designer), Sierra Fotouhi (Set Design Assistant), Darnell Depradine (Editor), and Jasjeet Singh (Localisation Editor). The next frame lists production management roles: Katie Haworth (Production Assistant), Francesca Hartley (Production Coordinator), Benjamin Whitley (Producer, Local Language), and Nikki Hopkins (Production Manager). The final credit frame features Tom Sandford (Senior Lead, Central Productions), Michael Gora (VP, Production Operations, Digital Video, Local Language), Ezzie Chidi-Ofong (SVP, Digital Video, Local Language), and Peerspace (Location). Throughout these credit displays, a light, upbeat instrumental background music with a consistent rhythm and melody is heard, creating a pleasant and unobtrusive atmosphere. The segment concludes with the iconic 'VOGUE' logo centered on the screen, presented in a bold, classic serif font against the same white background, signaling the end of the production credits and the brand’s association with the content, with the gentle background music continuing to play alongside the logo.

global_entity_library.Brown loafers: Comfortable, almost-brown leather loafers worn with the outfit, noted by Kendall's voice as 'super comfortable' and suitable for wearing 'everywhere.'
global_entity_library.High-waisted black jeans: Long, slim-fit black jeans with a high waist, praised for their perfect fit and length.
global_entity_library.Khaite sleeveless red sweater: A vibrant red, sleeveless sweater draped over the shoulders, described as a favorite layering piece.
global_entity_library.Kendall Jenner: Wearing a navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt over a grey collared shirt, black shorts, white socks, and white Adidas Samba trainers; she gestures while showcasing her black leather tote bag and sunglasses, then transitions into a light grey sleeveless maxi dress, barefoot, in a bright room with bookshelves and a clothing rack. She speaks in a clear, conversational voice, describing her most-worn items and concluding with a Vogue outro.
global_entity_library.Sunday Best black tee: A simple, fitted black t-shirt worn as the base layer of the outfit.
global_entity_library.Vintage Dolce & Gabbana dress: A form-fitting, sleeveless beige dress worn for a more formal Fashion Week look, described as comfortable and practical for moving between events.
global_entity_library.Black Gucci boots: Pointed-toe, mid-calf black leather boots with ankle ties, praised by Kendall as a beloved item she wears 'all the time' due to their comfort and stylish appearance.
global_entity_library.Bottega bag: A small, structured red bag with gold hardware, held by Kendall as a perfect accessory to match the Bottega look, described as ideal for a night out.
global_entity_library.Vintage Gucci sunglasses: Dark, classic cat-eye sunglasses worn to complete the 'Vacation Look', adding a touch of vintage glamour.
global_entity_library.Wednesday: A title card indicating the day of the week, signaling a shift to a new outfit segment.
global_entity_library.White t-shirt: Previously worn as a base layer in the 'Meeting Look', now replaced by a graphic tee in the 'Airport Look', and mentioned by Kendall as part of her 'doing business' ensemble.
global_entity_library.Blue jeans: Previously straight-leg medium-wash denim, now replaced by light-wash vintage Levi’s 501 jeans in the 'Airport Look', and mentioned by Kendall as part of her 'doing business' ensemble.
global_entity_library.The Row coat: Previously worn as a structured beige coat over the white t-shirt and jeans, described by Kendall as part of her 'doing business' look.
global_entity_library.Meeting Look: On-screen text describing the white t-shirt and jeans outfit as a professional, everyday look for work or meetings.
global_entity_library.Black boots: Previously described as 'ultimate favorite' riding boots, now worn with the 'Airport Look' outfit, maintaining their pointed-toe, mid-calf style, and mentioned by Kendall as part of her 'doing business' ensemble.
global_entity_library.Black shoulder bag: A structured black bag with a shoulder strap, carried in the 'Airport Look' for travel, replacing the previous Bottega bag, and identified by Kendall as 'The Row' and a 'really good bag to add a pop of color'.
global_entity_library.Black New York Yankees cap: A black baseball cap with a white 'NY' logo, worn backward, adding a casual, sporty touch to the 'Airport Look'.
global_entity_library.Distressed black leather jacket: A worn, vintage-style black leather jacket with visible distressing and hardware details, worn over a graphic tee for the 'Airport Look'; Kendall audibly states she'd wear it 'zipped up,' followed by the distinct sound of a zipper being pulled up.
global_entity_library.Vintage Harley-Davidson graphic tee: A dark t-shirt with a bold, retro Harley-Davidson motorcycle graphic, worn as the base layer in the 'Airport Look'.
global_entity_library.Vintage Levi’s 501 jeans: Light-wash, straight-leg denim jeans with a classic 501 fit, described as vintage and worn with the 'Airport Look'; Kendall audibly confirms they are 'Levi's 501s' and mentions she tailored them to fit, often needing men's jeans for sufficient length.
global_entity_library.Sandals: Simple, flat black sandals with a minimal strap design, worn for comfort and ease during the 'Vacation Look'.
global_entity_library.Vacation Look: On-screen text labeling the outfit as a relaxed, comfortable ensemble ideal for travel and leisure, which the speaker describes as her 'vacation vibe,' featuring the white Bode shirt, black bra top, black flowy pants, sandals, and custom bag.
global_entity_library.Black bra top: A simple, form-fitting black top, referred to by the speaker as 'a little bra top,' worn as a base layer under the white Bode shirt, visible at the neckline and midriff.
global_entity_library.White Bode shirt: A white, long-sleeved, relaxed-fit shirt, described by the speaker as a 'Bode shirt' that she loves and finds 'so pretty,' worn open over a black bra top, featuring subtle black stitching details along the front placket.
global_entity_library.Kendall’s Sunglasses: Dark, stylish sunglasses worn at the end of the segment to complete the outfit, which Kendall introduces by saying, "lastly, my sunglasses."
global_entity_library.Black pointed-toe boots: Pointed-toe, mid-calf black leather boots, worn with the 'Airport Look'; Kendall audibly identifies them as 'Row boots,' noting they are 'a bit high,' go 'up to the knee,' have a 'small little heel,' and are 'comfortable.'
global_entity_library.Black flowy pants: Loose, wide-leg black pants with a slouchy, comfortable fit, paired with flat sandals for a casual vacation aesthetic.
global_entity_library.Sheer black tights: Opaque black tights with a sheer texture, worn under the black leather mini dress to add sophistication and coverage, noted for their seamless fit.
global_entity_library.Red pointed-toe heels: Elegant, high-heeled shoes with a pointed toe and red patent finish, adding a pop of color and glamour to the 'Night Out Look', described as a favorite for going out.
global_entity_library.Black leather mini dress: A form-fitting, sleeveless black leather dress with a V-neckline, worn with sheer black tights and red heels, which Kendall describes as 'the vibe' for a night out, birthday party, or friend's dinner, making her feel 'very comfortable' and loved.
global_entity_library.Night Out Look: On-screen text introducing the outfit segment. Kendall introduces it as a 'Night out look, birthday party look, whatever you want to call it,' emphasizing her desire for comfort while feeling 'cute and sexy.'
global_entity_library.Custom Bag: A large, bright yellow tote bag, referred to by the speaker as a 'Bode bag' and a 'big sack bag,' which she received as a birthday gift. She expresses her love for its personalized, eclectic design, explaining that the 'Arizona' inscription is her dog's name, 'Kung Fu Kenny' is what her friends call her, and other designs represent her car and favorite places. She highlights its practicality for vacation, beach trips, and holding items like books and sunscreen, noting its 'very big' and 'perfect size for vacation.'
global_entity_library.Bottega earrings: Gold, chunky hoop earrings worn with the black leather mini dress. Kendall explicitly names them as 'Bottega earrings' and part of her 'all Bottega' ensemble.
global_entity_library.Workout bodysuit: A black, form-fitting one-piece athletic outfit with thin straps and shorts, worn for her 'workout day,' which she states is 'probably what you'll find me in most days of the week' for early morning Pilates.
global_entity_library.SUNDAY title card: A bold, black text overlay reading 'SUNDAY' that appears as a transition between outfit segments, signaling the start of a new day and look.
global_entity_library.White sneakers: Classic white athletic shoes with black stripes, identified by Kendall as 'Sambas,' which she wears for Pilates instead of a 'proper gym shoe.'
global_entity_library.Work Out Look: On-screen text labeling the athletic outfit segment, appearing in a split-screen format with a close-up of Kendall’s face and full-body shot, emphasizing the casual, functional nature of the look.
global_entity_library.Navy blue 'USA' sweatshirt: A vintage, oversized navy sweatshirt with 'USA' in bold red and white letters, described as cozy and worn-in, originally belonging to her father, worn over a grey collared shirt.
global_entity_library.Adidas Samba Trainers: Classic white athletic shoes with black stripes, worn with white socks and black shorts, completing the casual, everyday look.
global_entity_library.Production Credits: On-screen text listing production roles such as Key Grip, Sound Recordist, Wardrobe Stylist, Makeup Artist, Hair Stylist, Set Designer, Editor, Production Assistant, Production Coordinator, Producer, Production Manager, Senior Lead, VP, SVP, and Location, displayed in a clean, minimalist black font on a white background, accompanied by light, upbeat instrumental background music.
global_entity_library.Light grey sleeveless maxi dress: A flowing, elegant, light grey dress with a V-neckline and sheer overlay, worn barefoot, suggesting a relaxed or evening look, replacing the previous casual outfit.
global_entity_library.Black leather tote bag: A large, slouchy black leather tote bag from The Row, described by Kendall as "the bag you will see me in most in life," "wearing this bag probably every single day," "the most worn bag that I own," and one that "goes with literally everything." It is carried on her shoulder and shown in close-up, with a simple, versatile design.
global_entity_library.VOGUE Logo: The iconic 'VOGUE' brand name displayed in a bold, classic serif font, centered on a white background, marking the conclusion of the credits and the brand’s identity, with light, upbeat instrumental background music continuing to play alongside it.
